		function getHashedEmailLiveramp(){
			try {
				let hashedEmailStorageKey = "IC_HM"
				if(hashedEmailStorageKey != ""){
					let hashedValue = getFromStorageLiveramp(hashedEmailStorageKey);
					// check if fetched value is of type object or string
					try{
						hashedValue = JSON.parse(hashedValue);
					}catch(e){}
					if(typeof hashedValue == "string"){
							setUserLiveramp("emailHashes",hashedValue, true );
					}else if(typeof hashedValue == "object"){
						if("SHA1" in hashedValue && hashedValue.SHA1 != ""){
							setUserLiveramp("emailHashes",hashedValue.SHA1, true );
						}else if("SHA256" in hashedValue && hashedValue.SHA256 != ""){
							setUserLiveramp("emailHashes",hashedValue.SHA256, true );
						}
					}
				}else if(ICTAG){ // following script to fetch hashedemail by using pubcid
					let pubcid = "";
					let storageKey = "_pubcid"
					pubcid = getFromStorageLiveramp(storageKey);
					if(pubcid != ""){
						ICTAG.getPage().getHashEmailIds(pubcid, function(data){
							console.log("ats Data ----" + data)
							if(data && data != ""){
								try{
									let hashedEmail = data;
									if("SHA1" in hashedEmail && hashedEmail.SHA1 != "")
									{
										setUserLiveramp("emailHashes",hashedEmail.SHA1, true )
									}
								}catch(e) {
									console.log(e.message)
								}
							}
						});
					}
				}
			}
			catch(e) {
				console.log(e.message)
			}
		}
		// get data from localstorage/cookie
		function getFromStorageLiveramp(storageKey){
			let resp = "";
				try{
					if (typeof (Storage) !== "undefined"){
						if(localStorage.getItem(storageKey) != null && localStorage.getItem(storageKey) != ""){
							resp = localStorage.getItem(storageKey);
						}
					}else{
						if (navigator.cookieEnabled) {
								var value = "; " + document.cookie;
								var parts = value.split("; " + storageKey + "=");
								if (parts.length == 2){
									resp = parts.pop().split(";").shift();
								}
						}
					}
				}catch(e){}
			return resp;
		}

        }
        if(ICAYAPI){
            ICAYAPI.setDefaultTargeting(slot, adslot);
        }
    };
    ayManagerEnv.__updateSlotTargeting = function(slot) {

            ICAYAPI.setPlacementTargeting(slot);
        }
        slot.setTargeting("isloggedin", window._isLoggedIn);
    };

    ayManagerEnv.onEvent("afterDefineSlot", function(adUnitInstanceCode, slot) {

        var payload = event.data.payload;
        var slot = googletag.pubads().getSlots().find(function(slot) {
            return slot.getSlotElementId() == payload.slotId;
        });
  
        if (slot && ICAYAPI) {

        }
    });

    ic_pbjs.que.push(function() {
        var s2s = ic_pbjs.getConfig('s2sConfig');
        s2s = s2s && s2s[0];
        var s2sBidders = s2s && s2s.bidders;
        
        ic_pbjs.onEvent('setTargeting', function(event) {
            var adUnitCodes = Object.keys(event);
            googletag.pubads().getSlots().forEach(function(slot) {
                var slotId = slot.getSlotElementId();
                if (adUnitCodes.includes(slotId)) {
                    var bidder = event[slotId]['hb_bidder'];
                    var system = 'client';
                    if (bidder && s2sBidders && s2sBidders.includes(bidder)) {
                        system = 'server';
                    }
                    slot.setTargeting('ay_hb_system', system);

                    ayManagerEnv.__updateSlotTargeting(slot);
                }
            });
        });
    });

    (function() {
        var map = {"layout": "", "userState": "isloggedin", "custom_1": "adslot", "custom_2": "arc", "custom_3": "art", "custom_4": "uc", "custom_5": "pos", "custom_6": "fp", "custom_7": "rft", "custom_8": "viewCount", "custom_9": "AYTesting", "custom_10": "intent_iq_group", "custom_11": "mile_floors", "custom_12": "AYV", "custom_13": "identity"}
        window.addEventListener('assertive_logImpression', function(event) {
            var payload = event.data.payload;
            var targeting = payload.dfpTargetingMap;
            
            if (targeting) {
                Object.keys(map).forEach(function (key) {
                    try {
                        if (map[key]) {
                            var targetingValues = targeting[map[key]];
                            if (targetingValues && targetingValues.length) {
                                payload[key] = targetingValues[0];
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.error(e);
                    }
                });
            }
        });
    })();

    var div_id = 'ic_oop_1';
    var currentSlot = null;
    var isAudioOpen = false;

    window.previousURL = "";
    ayManagerEnv.onEvent('beforePageChange', function(arg) {
        if(window.previousURL != window.location.pathname) {
            window.previousURL = window.location.pathname;
            destroyOOP(div_id);
            addNewOOP(div_id, "/5206,21976450666/stockanalysis/lists");
        } 
    });
    addNewOOP(div_id, "/5206,21976450666/stockanalysis/lists");

    function addNewOOP(slotElementId, adUnitPath){
        const path = window.location.pathname;

        if (!true) {
           console.log("NO OOP");
            return;
        }
                   console.log("OOP");

        // Create div if it doesn't exist
        if(!document.getElementById(slotElementId)){
            var newDiv = document.createElement('div');
            newDiv.id = slotElementId;
            document.body.appendChild(newDiv);
        }
        
        googletag.cmd.push(function() {           
            currentSlot = googletag.defineOutOfPageSlot(adUnitPath, slotElementId)
                    .addService(googletag.pubads())
                    .setTargeting("isloggedin", window._isLoggedIn);
            
            if(currentSlot){
                if(ICAYAPI){
                    var device = (false)?"m":"d";
                    var adslot = device+"_"+"oop_1";
                    ICAYAPI.setDefaultTargeting(currentSlot,adslot);
                }
            }

            googletag.display(slotElementId);

            // Render listener
            googletag.pubads().addEventListener('slotRenderEnded', function(event) {

                if (event.slot !== currentSlot) return;

                if (event.isEmpty || (event.slot.getHtml()?.includes("ic-adhesion"))) {
                ayManagerEnv.__isOopUnfilled = true;
                ayManagerEnv.changePage?.();
                }

                // Wrap kill function only once
                if (typeof window.kill === "function" && !window.kill.__wrapped) {
                var oldKill = window.kill;
                window.kill = function() {
                    window.triggerAdhesion?.();
                    oldKill();
                };
                window.kill.__wrapped = true;
                }

            });
        });
        // Update tracking variables
        window.page_href = location.href;
        window.page_navigation = history.length;
        // console.log('OOP Slot created, adUnitPath:' + adUnitPath)
    }

    function destroyOOP(slotElementId){
        // console.log("destroyOOP"); 
        if (window.removeOOP && typeof window.removeOOP === 'function') {
           window.removeOOP();
        }
        googletag.cmd.push(function() {
            if(currentSlot) {
                googletag.destroySlots([currentSlot]);
                currentSlot = null;
            }
        });
        
        // Clear the div content
        var divElement = document.getElementById(slotElementId);
        if(divElement) {
            divElement.innerHTML = '';
        }
       // console.log('OOP Slot destroyed and DIV cleared')
    }

    function initAudioAdControl() {
        const playBtn = document.querySelector('#audio-player-button');

        // ✅ If page has no play button → do nothing
        if (!playBtn) return;

        // Play → destroy OOP
        playBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!isAudioOpen) {
                isAudioOpen = true;
                destroyOOP(div_id);
            }
        });

        // ✅ Use event delegation for close button (dynamic element)
        document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            const closeBtn = e.target.closest('[aria-label="Close audio player"]');

            if (closeBtn && isAudioOpen) {
                isAudioOpen = false;
                addNewOOP(div_id, "/5206,21976450666/stockanalysis/lists");
            }
        });
    }

    initAudioAdControl();

    // Re-init after SPA navigation
    ayManagerEnv.onEvent('afterPageChange', function() {
        setTimeout(initAudioAdControl, 500);
    });

  (() => {
  // ======= CONFIG =======
 
  // ======= 1. Check if Watchlist / Portfolio Page =======
  function isPortfolioOrWatchlistPage() {
    const url = location.href;
    const sites = [
      "stockanalysis.com/watchlist",
    ];
    const result = sites.some(site => url.includes(site));
    console.log("[Ticker Snatcher] Page check:", result);
    return result;
  }

  // ======= 2. Parse tickers from the portfolio/watchlist page =======
  function parseTickers() {
    try {
      const url = location.href;
      const found = new Set();
      const STOCKANALYSIS_RE = /[A-Z0-9.\-\/]{1,10}/;
     
      // --- StockAnalysis (watchlist page) ---
      if (url.includes("stockanalysis.com/watchlist")) {
        document.querySelectorAll("a.p-0\\.5").forEach(a => {
          var t = "";
          if(a.textContent.indexOf(":")>=0) {
            t = a.textContent.split(":")[1].toUpperCase().trim();
          } else {
            t = (a.textContent || "").toUpperCase().trim();
          }
          if (STOCKANALYSIS_RE.test(t)) found.add(t);
        });
      }
      // --- Fallback table scan for any site ---
      if (found.size === 0) {
        document.querySelectorAll("table").forEach(tbl => {
          try {
            const text = tbl.textContent || "";
            if (!/Ticker|Symbol/i.test(text)) return;
            tbl.querySelectorAll("tr").forEach(tr => {
              tr.querySelectorAll("td,th").forEach(cell => {
                const txt = (cell.textContent || "").toUpperCase().trim();
                if (/[A-Z0-9.\-\/]{1,10}/.test(txt)) found.add(txt);
              });
            });
          } catch {}
        });
      }

      const tickers = Array.from(found).sort();

      if (!tickers.length) {
        console.warn("[Ticker Snatcher] No tickers found. Portfolio may be empty.");
        return null;
      }

      console.log("[Ticker Snatcher] Extracted tickers:", tickers);
      return tickers;

    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[Ticker Snatcher] Error parsing tickers:", err);
      return null;
    }
  }

 
  // ======= RUN SEQUENCE =======
	function executeWatchlistScrapingCode() {
        if (!isPortfolioOrWatchlistPage())
            return;
        const tickers = parseTickers();
        if (tickers && tickers.length) {
            if (window.ICTAG) {
                for (let index = 0; index < tickers.length; index++) {
                    window.ICTAG.setTicker(tickers[index]);
                }
            }
        } else {
            console.log("[Ticker Snatcher] No tickers found.");
        }
        console.log("[Ticker Snatcher] Tickers found: ", tickers);
        googletag.cmd.push(function () {
            googletag.pubads().setTargeting('kw', 'wl');
        });
    }
    executeWatchlistScrapingCode();

    //SPA handing:
	(function(history){
		const pushState = history.pushState;
		const replaceState = history.replaceState;

		history.pushState = function(...args) {
			const result = pushState.apply(this, args);
			window.dispatchEvent(new Event("urlchange"));
			return result;
		};

		history.replaceState = function(...args) {
			const result = replaceState.apply(this, args);
			window.dispatchEvent(new Event("urlchange"));
			return result;
		};
	})(window.history);

	window.addEventListener("urlchange", () => {
		console.log("URL changed:", location.href);
		setTimeout(executeWatchlistScrapingCode,3000);
	});
})();

</script><script data-ay-manager-placement-id="IC_HEAD__ayManagerEnv__8" type="text/javascript">
